    Method
    Description
    List<InstanceMetrics>
    LocalRegistryMetricsSource.instances()
     
    default List<InstanceMetrics>
    MetricsSource.instances()
    Per-instance metrics for the cluster's Instances view — one entry per reporting member, each with that member's own summary and last-seen time.

    List<InstanceMetrics>

    Returns per-instance metrics.
    List<InstanceMetrics>
    SnapshotStore.liveInstances()
    The live snapshots as per-instance entries (id + last-seen + that instance's summary), for the dashboard's Instances view.
